title: Exotic Crunchy Syrian Pistachio Kebabs
description: A festive Syrian dish featuring ground pistachios and render fat, perfect for special occasions, this paleo-friendly recipe is both roasted and crunchy.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ground lamb, ground pistachios, rendered fat, chopped onion, minced garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Mix all the ingredients together with your hands until just combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Thread the mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the kebabs in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the kebabs from the oven and let them rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
Traditionally, these kebabs are served with a side of roasted vegetables or a salad.
